_metadata.description: Fuel combustion emission factors in kgCO2e per unit (includes CO2, CH4, N2O)

sources.primary: IPCC 2006 Guidelines for National Greenhouse Gas Inventories, Vol. 2, Chapter 2, Table 2.2-2.5 (default emission factors by fuel type)
sources.crossReference: UK DESNZ GHG Conversion Factors 2024 (fuel combustion section) — values within 2% of IPCC defaults
sources.note: These are globally standard values. Country-level variation in natural gas composition can cause ±5% differences, but IPCC defaults are accepted for estimation purposes.

natural_gas._source: IPCC 2006 Vol.2 Ch.2. Cross-ref: DESNZ 2024 = 2.02 kgCO2e/m3

diesel._source: IPCC 2006 Vol.2 Ch.2. Cross-ref: DESNZ 2024 = 2.70 kgCO2e/L (gas oil), EPA = 2.68

gasoline._source: IPCC 2006 Vol.2 Ch.2. Cross-ref: DESNZ 2024 = 2.31 kgCO2e/L

lpg._source: IPCC 2006 Vol.2 Ch.2. Cross-ref: DESNZ 2024 = 2.94 kgCO2e/kg

fuel_oil._source: IPCC 2006 Vol.2 Ch.2 (heavy fuel oil / residual). Cross-ref: DESNZ 2024 = 3.18 kgCO2e/L
